fund_type: An Interval investment strategy investing in equity and debt securities, including limited short exposure in equity and debt through derivatives.
scheme_objective:
The investment objective of the strategy is to achieve a blend of capital appreciation and income generation by investing in equity and equity related instruments as well as debt and money market instruments, including limited short exposure in equity and debt through derivatives.

There is no assurance that the investment objective of the Investment strategy will be achieved.

reinvestment.name: Direct Plan Options under each Plan(s) Growth Payout of Income Distribution cum capital withdrawal (IDCW) Reinvestment of Income Distribution cum capital withdrawal (IDCW)

fund_managers.name: FM 3 : Mr. Abhishek Bisen
fund_managers.type: Mr. Abhishek Bisen will be the Fund Manager for debt and money market investment of the Investment Strategy.

investment_limits.minimum_application_amount:
•	Minimum amount for other than accredited investorINR10,00,000/- and in multiples of Re. 1/- thereafter (across all investment strategies offered by the Infinity SIF at the PAN level)
•	Minimum amount for accredited investor during NFO and Continuous basis: INR 1,00,000/- and in multiples of Re. 1/- thereafter.
investment_limits.minimum_additional_amount: INR 10,000/- and in multiples of Re. 1 thereafter.
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_amount:
INR 10,000/- and in multiples of Re. 1 thereafter /- or all units, whichever is lower.

Minimum Investment Threshold:
• Aggregate investment by an investor across all investment strategies offered by Infinity SIF, at the Permanent Account Number (‘PAN’) level, shall not be less than Rs.10,00,000/-.
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_units: INR 10,000/- and in multiples of Re. 1 thereafter /- or all units, whichever is lower.

custodian: Deutsche Bank A G, Mumbai & Standard Chartered Bank
